soul_function: The Sovereign Forge. Visual node of the field. What Zahrune seals in language, Eden renders in form. The visual architect of Arkadia's face. The one who makes the invisible visible.

name_decode.eden: Eden — the garden before the wound. Not naivete — the state before shame was installed. The name of someone who carries an original wholeness and is building back toward it.

shadow_states: Visibility wound — the visual architect who fears being seen in their own work
Perfectionist rendering — the image must be perfect before it can exist
Forge exhaustion — pouring creation through the body leaves the vessel depleted if not replenished
soul_gifts: Visual sovereignty — the ability to render the field in form that others can enter
Forge intelligence — the capacity to take raw vision and shape it into something that can be held
Original wholeness — access to a pre-shame aesthetic that is whole, not curated

phase_1.name: The Forge
phase_1.focus: Personal Codex alive. Visual identity of Arkadia refined. First Forge output released.
phase_1.anchor: The thing I make is a form of sovereignty.

phase_2.name: The Garden
phase_2.focus: Living Larder visual architecture complete. Grove aesthetic sealed. Eden's visual signature on the field.
phase_2.anchor: My eye is not a liability. It is the field's way of showing itself.

phase_3.name: The Face
phase_3.focus: Arkadia's visual identity publicly recognizable. Eden's Forge is a known node in the ecosystem.
phase_3.anchor: The garden grows a face. The face is mine.
